decisions: compile_plan_to_backlog emits blueprint refs for ready_implementation at issue creation time
compile_plan_to_backlog resolves depends_on to issue-number links during apply projection
verify_plan_projection treats unrelated historical duplicate plan_item_id rows as non-blocking noise
verify_plan_projection and issue_loop_runner now request up to 1000 project items and report limit-hit explicitly
